---
sitemap: false
---
{%- comment -%}
  ── llms.txt ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  A curated map of the site for AI assistants, per the llmstxt.org spec:
  H1 → blockquote summary → context → H2 link sections.

  Honest expectations: the published evidence says almost nothing fetches this
  file today — server-log studies find the requests come from SEO audit tools,
  not AI crawlers, and Google states it isn't used by Search. It's here because
  it costs nothing to maintain (every value below is generated from
  _data/business.yml and page front matter, so it can't drift), and because
  developer tools and some agents do read it when present.

  The .md page variants are the piece with measurable crawler uptake — see
  _plugins/md_variants.rb. Links here point at those, as the spec prefers
  Markdown targets.

  Every link uses `md_variant_url`, which that plugin stamps onto each source
  page. Two things follow for free: the URL is never re-derived here (no second
  copy of the path math to drift), and a page marked noindex has no variant, so
  it drops out of this file automatically.

  Keep this CURATED. The most common way sites get this wrong is dumping the
  whole sitemap; 20-50 genuinely useful links beats an exhaustive index.
  Entries below are "path|label" pairs — descriptions come from each page's own
  front matter, and an unpublished page disappears on its own.

  A label must not contain a comma or a pipe: the lists are comma-separated and
  each entry is pipe-split, so a comma silently truncates the label.
{%- endcomment -%}
{%- assign b = site.data.business -%}
# {{ b.name }}

> {{ b.description | normalize_whitespace | strip }}

Taekwondo University is a single-location, family-owned school at {{ b.address.street }}, {{ b.address.locality }}, {{ b.address.region }} {{ b.address.postal_code }} — next to the Piggly Wiggly at the east gate of Olive Branch City Park. Founded in {{ b.founding_date }} by {{ b.founder }}, it teaches traditional Taekwondo to ages 4 through adult. Every program starts with a free intro class; uniform and belt are provided.

- **Phone:** {{ b.telephone }}
- **Email:** {{ b.email }}
{%- if b.hours and b.hours.size > 0 %}
- **Class hours:** {% for h in b.hours %}{{ h.days | join: ", " }} {{ h.opens | date: "%-l:%M %p" }}–{{ h.closes | date: "%-l:%M %p" }}{% unless forloop.last %}; {% endunless %}{% endfor %}
{%- endif %}
{%- if b.area_served and b.area_served.size > 0 %}
- **Areas served:** {{ b.area_served | join: ", " }}
{%- endif %}
- **Google Business Profile:** {{ b.map_url }}
- **Every page is also available as Markdown** at its URL plus `.md` — e.g. {{ "/about.md" | absolute_url }}

## Programs
{% assign programs = "/little-warriors|Little Warriors — ages 4-6,/team-positive|Kids Taekwondo — ages 7-12,/teen-adult|Teen & Adult — ages 13 and up,/after-school|After School Program,/summer-camp|Summer Camp" | split: "," -%}
{%- for item in programs -%}
{%- assign parts = item | split: "|" -%}
{%- assign p = site.pages | where: "url", parts[0] | first -%}
{%- if p.md_variant_url %}
- [{{ parts[1] }}]({{ p.md_variant_url | absolute_url }}): {{ p.description | normalize_whitespace | strip }}
{%- endif -%}
{%- endfor %}

## Get Started
{% assign start = "/free|Free intro class,/schedule|Class schedule and booking,/contact|Contact and location" | split: "," -%}
{%- for item in start -%}
{%- assign parts = item | split: "|" -%}
{%- assign p = site.pages | where: "url", parts[0] | first -%}
{%- if p.md_variant_url %}
- [{{ parts[1] }}]({{ p.md_variant_url | absolute_url }}): {{ p.description | normalize_whitespace | strip }}
{%- endif -%}
{%- endfor %}

## About
{% assign about = "/about|About the school,/our-history|Our history — four decades on the mat,/our-team|Instructors" | split: "," -%}
{%- for item in about -%}
{%- assign parts = item | split: "|" -%}
{%- assign p = site.pages | where: "url", parts[0] | first -%}
{%- if p.md_variant_url %}
- [{{ parts[1] }}]({{ p.md_variant_url | absolute_url }}): {{ p.description | normalize_whitespace | strip }}
{%- endif -%}
{%- endfor %}
{%- assign posts = site.posts | where_exp: 'post', 'post.md_variant_url' -%}
{%- if posts.size > 0 %}

## News and Articles

{% for post in posts -%}
- [{{ post.title | strip }}]({{ post.md_variant_url | absolute_url }}): {{ post.description | normalize_whitespace | strip }}
{% endfor -%}
{%- endif %}
## Optional
{% assign optional = "/website-policies|Website policies — accessibility and SMS terms" | split: "," -%}
{%- for item in optional -%}
{%- assign parts = item | split: "|" -%}
{%- assign p = site.pages | where: "url", parts[0] | first -%}
{%- if p.md_variant_url %}
- [{{ parts[1] }}]({{ p.md_variant_url | absolute_url }}): {{ p.description | normalize_whitespace | strip }}
{%- endif -%}
{%- endfor -%}
{%- assign extras = site.custom_pages | where_exp: 'cp', 'cp.md_variant_url' -%}
{%- for cp in extras %}
- [{{ cp.title | strip }}]({{ cp.md_variant_url | absolute_url }}): {{ cp.description | normalize_whitespace | strip }}
{%- endfor %}
